subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the verses of God! Though that lamp hath gone forth from the glass of contingent being and is buffeted by the winds of trials [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن بایات الله آن سراج اگرچه از زجاجه امکان برون گشت و باریاح حوادث بحسب
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
